tape: Equities firm and calm into the afternoon -- S&P +0.3%, Nasdaq +0.6%, Dow +0.2%, VIX ~16.1 (-2.5%) on soft June PPI (-0.3% headline) following Tuesday's cool CPI plus ASML's bullish AI-capex guide; quant_regime calm_drift agrees with my read, no sector shock, energy/geopolitics remains the isolated tail rather than a broad risk-off.

alerts.headline: Broad tape firm/calm: S&P +0.3%, Nasdaq +0.6%, Dow +0.2%, VIX 16.09 (-2.5%) on soft June PPI + cool CPI + ASML AI-capex read (raised sales guide, +30% equipment capacity). Bank/health earnings benign; UAL after the close. No sector shock; quant_regime calm_drift concurs.

HELD ~$2.19 -- no NEW catalyst this hour; ATF instrument-of-restraint ruling (7/6) + WrapShield launch + Frenel US/NATO distribution deal already in the tape. risk.json: 7/13 8-K Frenel is a $2M securities-purchase (minor dilution), $200M baby-shelf CAPACITY only, insider activity is CEO BUYING. Phantom-sell path gated by fix a5484b6. FinBERT +0.019. No boost.

Post-lockup distribution overhang persists (Form 144 1.75M Class A 7/8 + Lightspeed sales). FinBERT +0.158. No boost.
